title: uniqe case report assert error when running

features.name: unique case with default clause in always_ff
features.description: Code should include a unique case statement with a default clause inside an always_ff block, where the case expression is a single-bit comparison (1'b1)

features.name: enum state variable with three states
features.description: Code should include an enum with three states used as a state variable in a sequential always_ff block
